item.title: This sweet angel was caught frolicking around in my parking lot in March! He warmed up very quickly and after a couple weeks of fostering he got adopted by my friend and her wonderful family. Now he is living the dream and thriving in his new home. 🐈‍⬛❤️🥰
item.description: By @shesgotcats: This sweet angel was caught frolicking around in my parking lot in March! He warmed up very quickly and after a couple weeks of fostering he got adopted by my friend and her wonderful family. Now he is living the dream and thriving in his new home. 🐈‍⬛❤️🥰
